title: AgencyFormulaCostSharingMOERequirementCode
description: A code that indicates whether the program (assistance listing) or funding opportunity project has a formula, cost sharing, or maintenance of effort (MOE) requirement.

oneOf.title: MOE
oneOf.description: This listing has maintenance of effort (MOE) requirements

oneOf.title: Formula
oneOf.description: This listing awards funds to recipients based on a statutory or regulatory formula

oneOf.title: Cost Sharing
oneOf.description: This listing has award recipient contribution requirements

oneOf.title: Not Applicable
oneOf.description: This listing does not have any statutory/regulatory formula, cost sharing, or maintenance of effort requirements

x-grantsActivityReferences: GRM.010.010 Grant Program Set-up and Maintenance
x-relatedElements: (3) Formula Matching Requirements Maintenance of Effort - Indicators
